articles.title: Dubare tragedy: Upalokayukta takes suo motu cognisance, seeks report
articles.description: The recent tragedy at the Dubare Elephant Camp near Kushalnagar in Kodagu district, in which a woman tourist from Tamil Nadu lost her life after two captive elephants clashed during a bathing session in the Cauvery river, has come under scrutiny, with Upalokayukta Justice K.N. Phaneendra registering a suo motu complaint over the incident.

articles.title: SRH vs RCB IPL 2026 Live Streaming: Where to Watch Virat Kohli Chase Historic Record
articles.description: Today's SRH vs RCB clash is one of the biggest matches of IPL 2026. All eyes are on Virat Kohli, who is close to a special record. Both teams are also fighting to lock in their spot for Qualifier-1.

articles.description: India’s largest drugmaker is building a wider presence beyond traditional generics, backed by specialty therapies, pipeline investments and expansion across international markets

articles.title: Something to riff through: A reading guide to Miles Davis, by Rachel Lopez
articles.description: Trace the jazz legend’s explosive relationship with music through a children’s book, a graphic novel, an artist’s account and more.

articles.title: Gardening Tips: Indoor Plants That Grow Easily with Little Care and Maintenance
articles.description: Indoor plants are a simple way to add greenery to your home without much effort. These low-maintenance varieties thrive with minimal care, making them perfect for beginners and busy lifestyles.

articles.title: Antonio Felix da Costa on Edoardo Mortara’s apology after Monaco E-Prix collision: “I just want people to apologise”
articles.description: Fans praised Antonio Felix da Costa for the way he reacted to Edoardo Mortara’s apology after the pair collided during Round 10 of the Monaco E-Prix. Mortara also earned admiration for quickly apologising to the Jaguar TCS Racing driver, who had already been involved in another incident with Dan Ticktum earlier in the weekend.

articles.title: 'Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu' movie review: A space Western worth watching
articles.description: Pedro Pascal: The Mandalorian and Grogu brings the Star Wars duo to cinemas with slick action creature battles and space Western charm. Jon Favreau’s film balances humour and nostalgia, though uneven pacing and predictable twists hold it back too.

articles.title: Rush of devotees: Plan afoot to revive 70yo trek route to Yamunotri
articles.description: Rush of devotees: Plan afoot to revive 70yo trek route to Yamunotri

articles.title: Caught On Camera: Man Dragged 500 Metres On Car Bonnet Over Alleged Loan Dispute in Mysuru (WATCH)
articles.description: In Mysuru, a man was allegedly dragged for nearly 500 metres on a car's bonnet following a dispute over money. The incident, which occurred when the man tried to stop his debtor from driving away, was captured on video and has since gone viral. Police have registered a case and are investigating the matter.

articles.title: Why government recommend keeping your AC at 24°C to reduce electricity consumption
articles.description: Why government recommend keeping your AC at 24°C to reduce electricity consumption

articles.title: How to set boundaries with love while raising emotionally secure kids
articles.description: Raising emotionally secure children involves steady love, fair rules, and safe limits, not unlimited freedom. Boundaries, when handled well, strengthen the parent-child bond by offering clarity, consistency, and guidance, fostering self-control, respect, and emotional safety. This approach builds trust and resilience.

articles.title: Edible Oil On Boil, Monthly Budget In Soup: Food Inflation Hits Households
articles.description: Households are feeling the squeeze as monthly grocery bill is increasing due to edible oil price rise.

articles.title: ‘You people did this’: Twisha Sharma case lawyer shouts at media after car runs over toes | VIDEO
articles.description: Lawyer Enosh George, representing Twisha Sharma’s mother-in-law, lost his temper and demanded an apology from journalists after a car allegedly ran over his foot outside the family’s Bhopal residence.

articles.title: Peddi | Kannada Song - Hellallallo (Promo)
articles.description: Watch the song 'Hellallallo' from Kannada movie 'Peddi' starring Ram Charan, Janhvi Kapoor and Shruthi Haasan. 'Hellallallo' is sung by Rakshita Suresh and music of the song is given by A R Rahman. Lyrics of 'Peddi' song 'Hellallallo' are written by Varadaraj Chikkaballapura. To know more about 'Hellallallo' song from Ram Charan, Janhvi Kapoor and Shruthi Haasan starrer 'Peddi' watch the video.

articles.title: ‘Unable to save them’: Two Indian mountaineers die during Everest descent
articles.description: Mount Everest, often a site of triumph, turned somber as two Indian climbers, Arun Kumar Tiwari and Sandeep Are, tragically lost their lives while descending from its peak. Reports confirmed their deaths on Friday, with experts suggesting extreme fatigue was to blame.

articles.title: DRI seizes 60,000 kg of smuggled areca nuts in North-East India
articles.description: The DRI seized 60,000 kg of smuggled areca nuts in the North-East and 300,000 e-cigarettes worth Rs 120 crore in a nationwide crackdown. Five people were arrested in the areca nut smuggling case, which originated from Myanmar.

articles.title: LG Sandhu unveils vision for Delhi to evolve into a 'metropolis'
articles.description: Delhi LG Taranjit Singh Sandhu outlined a plan to transform Delhi from a 'metro' to a 'metropolis'. The vision focuses on smart mobility, sustainability, disaster resilience, and developing Dwarka as an innovation and investment hub.

articles.title: RBI announces underwriting auction results for government securities
articles.description: The RBI announced the results for the underwriting auction of three Government of India securities, setting cut-off commission rates for primary dealers for the ACU portion of the 6.03% GS 2029, 6.68% GS 2033, and 7.24% GS 2055 bonds.

How to use lemongrass oil to keep lizards away: Easy tricks to stop these unwanted guests from climbing your walls
articles.description: Lemongrass oil offers a natural way to deter house lizards by masking their scent attractants and reducing insect prey. Its strong citrus aroma, particularly from compounds like citral, makes areas less appealing to lizards. Applying diluted lemongrass oil sprays or scented cotton balls near entry points and common lizard spots can help manage mild infestations.

articles.title: AksharChem Standalone March 2026 Net Sales at Rs 105.79 crore, up 16.58% Y-o-Y
Delhi Govt issues strict guidelines against illegal animal sacrifice ahead of Bakri Eid
articles.description: Delhi government announces strict rules for Bakri Eid. Animal sacrifice of certain animals is illegal. Sacrificing animals in public places is also banned. Illegal animal markets are not permitted. Improper disposal of animal waste and blood is prohibited. Citizens must report violations to authorities. The administration will take stern action against offenders.

articles.title: Bodal Chemicals Standalone March 2026 Net Sales at Rs 577.10 crore, up 29.53% Y-o-Y
Google Health 5.0 rolls out on Android with new Quick Access Widget, drops Fitbit branding
articles.description: Google Health 5.0 is now live on Android, featuring a new homescreen widget that replaces the old Steps widget, offering a customizable dashboard for various health metrics. The update also officially retires Fitbit branding from the app icon, focusing solely on Google Health for software. This move prepares for new Fitbit hardware and integrates Gemini-powered Health Coach across all sections.

articles.title: 'We Were Sworn Enemies': Samarth's Words From Wedding Video Take Dark Turn After Twisha's Death
articles.description: Twisha Sharma's tragic death has ignited a contentious dowry case between her family and that of her husband, Samarth Singh, following a seemingly joyful wedding captured in a cinematic video.

articles.title: Live: US Will Seize, Destroy Uranium, Says Trump; Iran Deal Hopes Dim Over Hormuz
articles.description: US President Trump indicated willingness to allow some highly enriched uranium under Iranian sites to remain but insisted the US will take control and likely destroy it.

articles.title: FMGE 2026 final edit window opens at natboard.edu.in: Check direct link to make corrections
articles.description: The National Board of Examinations in Medical Sciences (NBEMS) has opened the final selective edit window for the FMGE 2026 application form, allowing candidates to correct deficient images until June 10, 2026. This opportunity is specifically for uploading clear photograph, signature, and thumb impression images as per guidelines. The FMGE 2026 exam is scheduled for June 28, 2026.

articles.title: Two Kashmiri Locals Hid Terrorist Info From Security Forces: NIA in Pahalgam Attack Chargesheet | Exclusive
articles.description: The National Investigation Agency (NIA) has filed a chargesheet in the Pahalgam terror attack, implicating two locals, Bashir and Parvaiz, for concealing vital information about armed terrorists that could have prevented the attack.

articles.description: Family claims MC poll candidate, his son and police harassed 21-year-old; probe underway

Hilary Duff reveals childhood crush on Jonathan Taylor Thomas; says, 'He was the voice of Simba'
articles.description: Actor and singer Hilary Duff opened up about her first celebrity crush during a recent appearance on The Jennifer Hudson Show, revealing that she was a huge fan of former teen heartthrob Jonathan Taylor Thomas, according to People.

articles.title: Bharti group seeks UK support to increase BT stake without bid for takeover
articles.description: Bharti could increase its stake to as much as 29.9 per cent to gain greater economic exposure to BT but does not plan to pursue a full takeover

articles.title: Nick Jonas reveals real-life boy band experience helped him shape 'Power Ballad' character
articles.description: Singer-actor Nick Jonas says his personal experience as a member of the Jonas Brothers helped him portray his latest character in the upcoming musical comedy 'Power Ballad', according to People.

articles.title: MHT CET Answer Key 2026 Out for PCB, BCA, BBA and Other Exams
articles.description: MAH CET answer keys 2026 are available for PCB, BCA, BBA, and other exams. While the PCB answer key is final, the answer key for MAH-B.HMCT/BCA/BBA/BMS/BBM CET-2026 can be challenged in case of errors.

articles.title: US and Iran still at odds on key issues, but both sides report signs of progress
articles.description: US President Donald Trump said the US will eventually recover Iran's stockpile of highly enriched uranium.

articles.title: "Feels like COVID lockdown": Intense heatwave leaves Khajuraho's UNESCO temples, roads deserted; businesses shut
articles.description: Khajuraho experiences a severe heatwave. Temperatures are soaring to nearly 47 degrees Celsius. Normal life and tourism have come to a standstill. Streets are deserted. Businesses are shut. The situation resembles a lockdown. Authorities are providing water and shaded areas. Heatwave conditions are expected to continue for another week across many parts of India.

articles.title: Gujarat Police trace 701 missing persons under ‘Operation Milap’ in two weeks
articles.description: Gujarat Police's 'Operation Milap' successfully reunites 701 missing persons with families in just two weeks through extensive investigations.

articles.description: A long-term plan was prepared last year the Delhi government has began work on upgrading power infrastructure across all 70 assembly constituencies

articles.title: Delhi to Noida International Airport in 21 minutes under proposed high-speed rail corridor
articles.description: The Yamuna Expressway is being linked with key corridors including the Agra-Lucknow, Bundelkhand, Purvanchal, Delhi-Mumbai and Ganga expressways, significantly boosting the strategic importance of the region.

articles.title: The burden of borrowed expectations
articles.description: Somewhere between childhood and adulthood, an unannounced transfer occurs. A parent’s unspoken fear becomes our ambition, a family’s definition of what counts as a life well lived becomes our standard.

articles.title: Police reunite 118 missing people with families in February
articles.description: Police successfully reunited 118 missing individuals, including 31 children, with their families in February through 'Operation Milap'.

articles.title: Powerball jackpot climbs to $131 million for May 23 drawing - Here's what the winner could actually pocket on Saturday night
articles.description: The Powerball jackpot has surged to an estimated $131 million for the May 23 drawing. No ticket matched all numbers in the recent draw, causing the prize to roll over. Players across the United States are hoping for a life-changing win. The next drawing is scheduled for Saturday. Tickets are available in most US states and territories.

articles.title: Transporters’ three-day strike against cess hike begins, limited impact in Delhi-NCR
articles.description: Transport groups said freight movement into Delhi continued through the day and disputed the figures cited by the transporters’ body, which said only around 100-200 trucks entered Delhi, as opposed to around 70,000 trucks that usually enter Delhi daily

articles.title: Will Karl-Anthony Towns play tonight vs the Cleveland Cavaliers? Final update on the New York Knicks star’s injury report
articles.description: Karl-Anthony Towns is expected to play against the Cavaliers tonight, easing concerns about his recent calf and knee soreness. He played over 40 minutes in Game 1, contributing a double-double with 13 points and 13 rebounds, proving crucial for the Knicks' early series lead. His availability bolsters New York's offensive and rebounding power.
